summary_en: 46,000 shares (1.50% of S/O) acquired for ¥35.42M via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-26. Program authorized 2026-05-25 for same volume and price limit. Acquisition complete.
title_en: Notice of Results and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Book Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 26 May 2026, Japan Reliance Service Corporation completed the acquisition of 46,000 treasury shares at a total cost of ¥35.42 million via ToSTNeT-3 off-book trading on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This represents 1.50% of issued shares (excluding treasury stock). The acquisition was authorized by board resolution on 25 May 2026 with identical volume and price limits, and has now been fully executed and concluded. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency, enhance shareholder returns, and enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions.
